overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing exploration of the Sanctuary of Delphi. The player character walks through ancient Greek temple grounds featuring stone pathways, columned stoas, and classical statues under bright autumn sunlight with golden foliage.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the stone gateway entrance toward the open sanctuary grounds

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking away from camera toward the temple courtyard

entered.detail: tall limestone block wall forming the left boundary of the entrance passage
tall limestone block wall forming the right boundary of the entrance passage
small classical temple structure with columns marking the inner entrance
large stone temple building with decorative banners and columned facade
tall dark green cypress tree visible beyond the gate structure

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a third-person view walking through a narrow stone gateway entrance. High limestone walls flank both sides while a small temple gate structure stands ahead. The large main temple building becomes visible on the left as the camera advances along the cobblestone path.

events.description: exits the narrow stone gateway into the open temple courtyard
character turns slightly right to approach the central statue and altar area

agents.ego_description: walking through the open courtyard, approaching a large statue and altar before turning toward the stairs

notable_agents.action: two women in traditional dress conversing near the temple entrance

entered.detail: large marble statue of a robed figure holding a staff on a stone pedestal
rectangular stone altar with offerings and pottery arranged on top
tall tree with bright golden-yellow autumn foliage

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a sunlit courtyard dominated by the large temple building on the left. The camera approaches a central marble statue and altar where NPCs are gathered, then turns toward a stone staircase visible in the distance. Golden autumn trees frame the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase ascending to upper terrace

events.description: character turns left and begins ascending the wide stone staircase

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking up the stone stairs toward the upper level of the sanctuary

entered.detail: wide stone steps with worn surfaces leading upward to the terrace
retaining wall topped with a stone lion sculpture overlooking the stairs
long colonnaded building with multiple stone columns and blue banners

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left and ascends a broad stone staircase flanked by a retaining wall with a lion statue. As the character climbs, a large stoa with rows of columns comes into view on the left, while the main temple building recedes into the background.

agents.ego_description: walking along the front of the large stoa, passing groups of NPCs gathered near the columns

notable_agents.action: group of robed figures standing and conversing near the stoa entrance

entered.detail: long blue fabric banners hanging between the columns of the stoa
massive tree with dense golden-yellow foliage growing beside the stoa
stone statue of a robed figure on a high pedestal near the stoa

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the front of an impressive colonnaded stoa adorned with blue banners. The area is populated with several NPCs walking and standing in groups. A large autumn tree provides golden foliage contrast against the stone architecture as the camera approaches the main entrance area.

events.description: character slows and stops to approach the kneeling figure at the entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching a kneeling NPC at the stoa entrance, preparing for interaction

notable_agents.action: figure kneeling on the ground in a supplicant pose near the entrance drapes

entered.detail: heavy fabric curtains hanging between columns marking the entrance to the covered area

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the shadow of the stoa's roof, approaching the entrance draped with fabric. A kneeling figure is positioned at the entrance, and the character slows to interact. The surrounding columns frame the scene as the lighting shifts to dappled shade.

events.description: camera cuts to cinematic view revealing the Snake Rock discovery location

agents.ego_description: observing the discovery site in a cinematic cutscene view

entered.detail: large weathered rock outcrop with distinctive shape surrounded by dry grass
ancient temple structures visible in the far background among trees

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a cinematic cutscene showing a rocky outcrop in a natural setting with autumn vegetation. The camera pans around the discovery site showing distant temple ruins, marking the completion of the location discovery objective.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined stone entrance into an expansive, sunlit temple complex. It begins by passing through a narrow limestone gateway, moving along a cobblestone path as the massive main temple building first emerges on the left. As the camera advances, the space opens into a bright courtyard where the view shifts from a central marble statue and altar toward a distant stone staircase framed by golden autumn trees. The scene then turns left to ascend a broad set of stairs flanked by a lion statue, finally revealing a long, columned stoa as the main temple recedes into the background.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the bustling architecture of a temple complex into a secluded natural overlook. It begins with the character walking past a colonnaded stoa adorned with blue banners, where golden autumn foliage contrasts against the stone and groups of NPCs populate the grounds. As the camera approaches the main entrance, the scene shifts into the dappled shade of the roof, slowing down to focus on a kneeling figure draped in fabric. The perspective then transitions away from the structured temple grounds to a cinematic pan across a rocky outcrop surrounded by autumn vegetation. Finally, the view expands to reveal distant temple ruins nestled within the landscape, marking the discovery of the site.
